title: ORDER BY LCASE() not working as expected
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, 'short'), (2, 'this is a long string that exceeds twenty characters'), (3, 'another long string example');
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value FROM test_strings ORDER BY LOWER(value);
SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(value) > 20 ORDER BY LOWER(value);
key_bug_features: ORDER BY with lcase() fails on long strings
